# Page 1^page=1
Monday / Wednesday / Friday Medication Checklist These medications are NOT daily. Use this page to avoid missed or double doses. Medication Purpose Monday Wednesday Friday Notes Azithromycin 250mg COPD exacerbation prevention ■ ■ ■ Antibiotic Bactrim DS (Sulfamethoxazole/Trimethoprim) Prevent infection during steroid use ■ ■ ■ Monitor potassium Important: Bactrim can increase potassium levels. BMP lab follow-up is important. Watch for unusual weakness, confusion, or worsening symptoms.
